title: 30 Million
overview: Sami, Zouhair, and Hicham get involved in a trouble with the police, which results in Sami's arrest. As Hicham and Zouhair rush to request aid from Amal and Sara and the lawyer Nisrin to help their detained buddy, but they run into complications, including coming up with 30 million for his bail.
